ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_survey" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "heart_disease" TEXT /* Presence of heart disease */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "smoking" TEXT /* Smoking habit */,
  "alcohol_drinking" TEXT /* Alcohol drinking habit */,
  "stroke" TEXT /* History of stroke */,
  "physical_health" INTEGER /* Physical health rating */,
  "mental_health" INTEGER /* Mental health rating */,
  "diff_walking" TEXT /* Difficulty walking */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race */,
  "diabetic" TEXT /* Diabetic status */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level */,
  "gen_health" TEXT /* General health perception */,
  "sleep_time" INTEGER /* Sleep time */,
  "asthma" TEXT /* Asthma condition */,
  "kidney_disease" TEXT /* Kidney disease */,
  "skin_cancer" TEXT /* Skin cancer */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor who conducted the survey */,
  "participant_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey response */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey response */,
  "heart_disease" TEXT /* Presence of heart disease */,
  "stroke" TEXT /* History of stroke */,
  "asthma" TEXT /* Asthma condition */,
  "kidney_disease" TEXT /* Kidney disease */,
  "skin_cancer" TEXT /* Skin cancer */,
  "condition_onset" TEXT /* Date when the condition was first diagnosed */,
  "condition_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or medication for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey response */,
  "smoking" TEXT /* Smoking habit */,
  "alcohol_drinking" TEXT /* Alcohol drinking habit */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level */,
  "sleep_time" INTEGER /* Sleep time */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Diet type */,
  "physical_activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of physical activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health rating entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey response */,
  "physical_health" INTEGER /* Physical health rating */,
  "mental_health" INTEGER /* Mental health rating */,
  "gen_health" TEXT /* General health perception */,
  "health_rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the health ratings were provided */,
  "health_rating_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the health ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_ratings_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey response */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "diabetic" TEXT /* Diabetic status */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant */,
  "participant_engagement" TEXT /* Engagement level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the survey data */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of accessing the survey data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES health_survey ("survey_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each survey response
Date when the survey was conducted
ID of the surveyor who conducted the survey
Additional notes or comments from the participant
Unique identifier for each demographic entry
Unique identifier for each health condition entry
Date when the condition was first diagnosed
Treatment or medication for the condition
Unique identifier for each lifestyle entry
Unique identifier for each health rating entry
Date when the health ratings were provided
Additional notes or comments about the health ratings
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the survey being accessed
ID of the user accessing the survey
Date when the survey data was accessed
Purpose of accessing the survey data
Outcome of accessing the survey data
